_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to provide mitigations to recover from a full network compromise.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.456), DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.393).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.679). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [compromise, full, mitigations, network, provide, recover] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, application, causes, code, data, databases] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.872, R=0.838). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Ability to provide mitigations to recover from a full network compromise." and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.457 < STS 0.679 (gap -0.221). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [compromise, full, mitigations] and [across, application, causes] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [compromise, full, mitigations, network, provide, recover]. WIDAI-only: [across, application, causes, code, data, databases].
